meaning: adv.在(书之页,章等)之开头,在卷首
examples: The agreement was declared void ab initio.
The reaction of HNO with o radical was investigated by density functional theory (DFT) and ab initio methods.
Ab initio molecular orbital method has been employed, in this paper, to study the mechanism of the hydrolysis of acetylcholine.
According to Tim Hubbard, a computational biologist at the Sanger Centre in Cambridge, England, the big question in protein modelling is why ab initio modelling has hitherto been so unsuccessful.
